title: Raccoon Removal in Lenox Hill, Manhattan | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Lenox Hill, Manhattan. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup for townhomes and luxury buildings. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: Lenox Hill's mix of luxury high-rises, historic townhomes, and proximity to Central Park creates ideal conditions for raccoon intrusions. Our expert raccoon removal services protect your Upper East Side property from these intelligent and persistent wildlife invaders. Best Pest Control NYC provides humane, effective solutions tailored to Lenox Hill's unique residential and commercial landscape.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in wildlife management for Manhattan's most prestigious neighborhoods, including Lenox Hill. Our licensed technicians understand the specific challenges of raccoon activity in urban environments and use humane, code-compliant methods that protect both your property and New York's wildlife.
localContext: Lenox Hill's tree-lined streets near Central Park, Rockefeller University, and Lenox Hill Hospital attract raccoons seeking food and shelter in building crawl spaces, rooftops, and chimneys. The neighborhood's elegant pre-war buildings and brownstones provide numerous entry points that require expert sealing and exclusion work to prevent recurring infestations.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: Lenox Hill's proximity to Central Park provides a natural habitat corridor for raccoons, while the neighborhood's mature trees, accessible trash areas, and older building stock offer abundant food sources and nesting sites. Raccoons are highly adaptable and thrive in this Upper East Side environment.

faqs.question: What does the $900–$4,000 price range cover for raccoon removal?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, access difficulty, and necessary repairs. Basic single-raccoon trapping and removal starts around $900, while extensive cases involving multiple animals, attic cleanup, insulation replacement, and structural exclusion work can reach $4,000 or more.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Lenox Hill residents experiencing raccoon emergencies. Our team understands the urgency of wildlife intrusions in residential buildings and works quickly to assess the situation, trap animals humanely, and begin exclusion work to prevent re-entry.

faqs.question: Do you provide raccoon-proofing for Lenox Hill buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, comprehensive exclusion is a critical part of our service. We seal entry points on roofs, chimneys, vents, and foundation gaps using durable materials that meet NYC building codes. For Lenox Hill's historic and luxury properties, we ensure repairs maintain architectural integrity while effectively preventing future raccoon access.
